Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions from our clients

What areas do you service?

We service all major cities and regions across Australia, including Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, and surrounding areas. Contact us if you're unsure about your location.

How long does a typical build take?

A custom home build typically takes 8-12 months, depending on size, complexity, and weather conditions. Renovations and extensions usually take 3-6 months.

Do you provide fixed-price contracts?

Yes, we offer fixed-price contracts for all our projects, giving you certainty and peace of mind throughout the build process.

What warranties do you offer?

We provide comprehensive structural warranties up to 7 years, along with manufacturer warranties on all fixtures and fittings.

A
ApexBuilders

Apex Home Builders has been helping Australian families build their dream homes since 1998. We combine innovative design with traditional craftsmanship.
